Solana alpha alerts with proof and context

Alpha only matters if users can inspect it fast. SlimeWire connects fresh pairs, wallet signals, Telegram calls, scans, chart links, and proof trails.

Open terminalTelegram alerts

What this workflow covers

Fresh pair alpha

Surface early Solana pairs before they go stale.

Wallet signals

Use wallet activity as context, not blind gospel.

Telegram calls

Make calls easier to inspect and revisit.

Chart handoff

Open the selected token without losing the CA.

Proof cards

Keep outcomes visible after the chat scrolls.

Risk context

Alpha alerts should never pretend a coin is safe.

FAQ

What are Solana alpha alerts?

Solana alpha alerts are notifications about fresh pairs, wallet activity, calls, or market movement that may deserve review.

Are alpha alerts financial advice?

No. Alpha alerts are discovery context and users are responsible for their own trading decisions.

Why should alpha alerts include proof?

Proof cards and receipts help users review whether alerts and calls actually produced useful outcomes.
